| list1name = Satipaṭṭhāna | list1title = [[Satipaṭṭhāna]] | list1 = * Mindfulness of the body * Mindfulness of feelings ([[:en:Vedanā|Vedanā]]) * Mindfulness of the mind ([[:en:Citta|Citta]]) * Mindfulness of principles (dhammas) | list2name = Sammappadhāna | list2title = [[:en:Four Right Exertions|Four Right Exertions]] (''sammappadhāna'') | list2 = *Prevent the [[Merit (Buddhism)#Puñña, kusala and Nirvana|unwholesome]] *Let go of present unwholesome states *Make wholesome states arise *Sustain /cultivate the wholesome | list3name = Iddhipāda | list3title = [[Iddhipāda|Four bases of power]] (''iddhipāda'') | list3 = * Will (''[[:en:Chanda (Buddhism)|chanda]]'') * Heroic effort (''[[:en:Viriya|Viriya]]'') # Mind (''[[:en:Citta|Citta]]'') # Analysis (''vīmaṁsa'') | list4name = pañca indriya | list4title = [[:en:Indriya|Five faculties]] (''pañca-indriya'') | list4 = * Conviction (''[[saddhā]]'') * Heroic Effort (''viriya'') * Mindfulness (''[[:en:Sati (Buddhism)|sati]]'') * ''[[:en:Samadhi|Samādhi]]'' * Wisdom (''[[:en:Wisdom in Buddhism|paññā]]'') | list5name = pañca bala | list5title = [[:en:Five Strengths|Five Strengths]] (''pañcabala'') | list5 = * Conviction (''[[saddhā]]'') * Heroic Effort (''viriya'') * Mindfulness (''[[:en:Sati (Buddhism)|sati]]'') * ''[[:en:Samadhi|Samādhi]]'' * Wisdom (''[[:en:Wisdom in Buddhism|paññā]]'') | list6name = Satta bojjhaṅgā | list6title = [[:en:Seven Factors of Awakening|Seven Factors of Awakening]] (''sattabojjhaṅgā'') | list6 = * Mindfulness (''[[:en:Mindfulness (Buddhism)|sati]]'') * Investigation (''[[:en:Dhamma vicaya|Dhamma vicaya]]'') * Heroic effort (''[[:en:Vīrya|viriya]]'') * Bliss (''[[:en:Pīti|Pīti]]'') * Calm (''[[:en:Passaddhi|Passaddhi]]'') * ''[[Samādhi (Buddhism)|Samādhi]]'' * Equanimity (''[[:en:Upekkha|Upekkha]]'') | list7name = Noble Eightfold Path | list7title = [[:en:Noble Eightfold Path|Noble Eightfold Path]] | list7 = *[[Noble Eightfold Path#Right%20view|Right view]] *[[Noble Eightfold Path#Right%20resolve|Right resolve]] *[[Noble Eightfold Path#Right%20speech|Right speech]] *[[Noble Eightfold Path#Right%20action|Right action]] *[[Noble Eightfold Path#Right%20livelihood|Right livelihood]] *[[Noble Eightfold Path#Right%20effort|Right effort]] *[[Noble Eightfold Path#Right%20mindfulness|Right mindfulness]] *[[Samādhi (Buddhism)|Right Samādhi]]
| belowclass = plainlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Religion}} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}}
